title: Button column link to other board (user select)
excerpt:
hi, i need a button feature in item to move to another board, so when i click the button, move to board that i select 
each button item that i clicked move to any board that i select

posts.author: hendra (hendra)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi, i need a button feature in item to move to another board, so when i click the button, move to board that i select
each button item that i clicked move to any board that i select

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @hendra you should be able to do this via an automation.

if you create a new “Status” column and create a Status with the board name you would like the item to move to you can change the status on the board and the automation you build will automatically move it in the background for you

image866×412 14.5 KB

You can find more information https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001222900-monday-com-Automations
